Stars.Requirements: |@GoodJumps| or (|!obscure| and |Wall Badge|) or (|!hard| and |@Badgeless Wallkick|)
Stars.Comment: You can backflip wallkick the chimney and edgegrind on the slippery slope of the house to get to the chimney slope, ledgegrab that slope, and use it to get to the star. There's also a pole you can wallkick off of to get the star with just wall badge (freefall wallkick) but its a bit hard to find if you don't know about it

Stars.Comment:
strict logic expects you to actually find the star using the blue coin switch
possible to use slidekick or dive to get across the two gaps you cant get across with backflip but its a little tight. also can use backflip wallkicks

Stars.Requirements: |@C1Scaffolding| and (|@Normal Wallkick| or (|@HighJumps| and |@Badgeless Wallkick|)) and (|@GoodJumps| or (|Dive| and |!hard|))
Stars.Comment: after the backflip wallkick from star 5 you need to do a dive off the tree since backflip cant get across the gap.
can just long jump around the scaffolding, super easy and obvious. can also backflip wallkick up but its kinda tight
Can break box with rollout and lure a goomba over and jump on it to collect the star
